title: Gourd Guards!
description: Adds a pumpkin raid to minecraft!
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d08c81b9681fe56a0f6235b004362f061215c75.png)

Gourd Guards Is a pumpkin mod that is a mod that adds a pumpkin raid to start the raid you need to get a pumpkin Jem. Its crafted like so.

Needs Geckolib and Palette Lib

Credits to bart for the pumpkin [Pumpkin Block](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/bart-s-pumpkins/)

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1e081c0eb5616005596c019af4158af380725e6.png)

These are the mobs that spawn in the raid.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f99ce505b8d35a66dc0d4be36d86634eba9c6db.png)

Jackkin is the foot soldier of this raid and has 25 hp.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dafea6c6f0a19e6a6ab4b0a352d70b309a9e5ad8.png)

Galapagourd is a turtle like mob and is immune to projectiles. It has 30 hp and has high defense.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36c34ae2a75f14c3a2d22778ca951c9480263439.png)

Fearcrow is a scarecrow mob that acts like the creaking. It has 25 hp and is very fast.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c74852c8ef92a540c8add074adaa70f284df644.png)

Gourdleap is a big frog with a pumpkin on his back. It has 55 hp.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef6f04e5dd79c2a0d3cebc3f4522dae6f5adf9ce.png)

Gourdlem is a miniboss with retractable blades in its hands it has 95 hp.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a331366ead175aadbda1e8c04a89bb05f030125.png)

Gourdian is the boss of the raid. It has 185 hp and summons vines to attack you.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab1979bae481e870d6cbfe98f1735853b8699702.png)

This mod was made in 3 days because I procrastinated 💀💀💀
